iC2 Clients

Advice CRM Workspace

A focused home for client records, letters, file notes, and adviser administration.

DashboardRecent work, activity, and shortcuts.ClientsSearch, create, and manage client records.LettersGenerate client letters and advice outputs.AdminManage users, licensees, and practices.My ProfileManage your account and personal settings.

Adviser Workspace

Initial shell for advisers, paraplanners, and support staff with role-aware access to follow.

V1 foundation

Client work should feel calm, fast, and obvious.

This first build focuses on the day-to-day workflows you called out: client creation, client record updates, file notes, document storage, and basic letter generation. We can keep the familiar Bubble-era layout while improving structure underneath.
